title: JUL-297 On A Summer Day So Hot You Could Boil Water, My Neighbor Came Inside Me Over And Over Again... Maki Tomoda
description: As a farmer in the countryside, when I got the vegetables ... I was handing them out all over the neighborhood with my gratitude. Meanwhile, I was worried that the wife of the Tomoda family next door was only interested in stick-shaped vegetables. However, my husband works at Agricultural ○, so if I put my hand out, it would be a big deal. One day when I was spending such frustrating days, when I went to hand out vegetables as usual, Maki-san forcibly pressed me and I couldn't move my hips even once and put it inside.
